title: Soft Touch Newborn Essentials 100% Cotton Baby Muslin Cloths 6 Pack 70 x 70 cm
features: Premium Quality: Our baby muslin cloths are crafted from 100% cotton for ultimate softness against your newborn's delicate skin, providing breathability and comfort while being gentle enough for daily use

Multi-Purpose Muslin Cloths for Baby: These versatile muslin blanket baby essentials become softer with each wash and can serve as a muslin comforter, swaddle up blanket, nursing cover or breathable baby blanket for all seasons

Generous Size: Each cotton muslin cloth for baby measures a spacious 70 x 70 cm, offering generous coverage as a muslin blanket, swaddle wrap, or burp cloths for newborn feeding and nappy changes. Providing ample fabric for all your baby care needs

Easy Care: Our baby muslins are machine washable and quick-drying, making them practical muslin squares baby essentials for busy parents while maintaining their cotton softness and quality wash after wash

Perfect Baby Gift Choice: This beautiful 6-pack of cotton muslin cloths for baby makes an elegant and practical baby gift, new born baby essentials, and newborn gift set, arriving in an attractive gift-ready package ideal for baby showers or hospital bags
description: Product Description OEKO-TEX Certified Cotton Muslin Squares Safe, Soft, and Trusted by UK Parents Designed with care for delicate newborn skin – 100% cotton, breathable weave trusted by thousands of UK parents What’s in the Set? 6 Premium Muslin Squares | 70x70cm | Soft Touch Colour Collection - choose from a range of options, from assorted packs to block colours. Made from 100% cotton – naturally hypoallergenic, breathable, and even softer after every wash Designed for Every Moment Gentle on sensitive baby skin Made using the finest quality yarn, this pack of muslin squares are made from100% OEKO-TEX Certified Hypoallergenic Cotton, ensuring your babys safety What's your Pick? Choose from our wide assortment of colour options. There is sure to be a colour to suit your home. Soft Touch EST 1986 Choose from a trusted brand with almost 40 years experience producing the highest quality babywear products. Versatile by Design From swaddling to wiping up spills, this set grows with your baby and adapts to your day. Are these muslin cloths suitable for newborns with sensitive skin? Absolutely! Made from 100% premium cotton, they are hypoallergenic, breathable and perfect for delicate newborn skin. The natural cotton fibers become softer with each wash, making them perfect from day one onwards. What makes these different from cheaper supermarket muslins? Premium 100% cotton (not blends), larger size, and superior durability. Our muslins maintain softness after 100+ washes while cheaper ones thin out and shrink quickly. Parents report ours outlast alternatives 3:1, making them better long-term value. What are all the ways I can use these muslins? Burp cloths, nursing covers, pram shades, changing mat covers, tummy time mats, light blankets, bibs, bath towels, and playtime surfaces. The versatility makes them essential for every baby bag and daily use. You can even make use as tea towels! How long will these last with regular washing? Years! Parents use them daily for 2-3+ years, even through multiple children. Premium cotton withstands 100+ washes while maintaining softness. Unlike cheaper muslins that develop holes, ours deliver lasting value. Are these good for a baby shower gift? Perfect gift! Muslins are an essential item that new parents use daily for years. Unlike clothes babies outgrow quickly, these remain useful. Paired with other Soft Touch items, they make a thoughtful, practical present.
